title: Access Bank Acquires 100% Stake in Bidvest Bank - FinancialEDGE
description: Access Holdings Plc has announced that its banking subsidiary, Access Bank has entered into a binding agreement with South Africa-based Bidvest Group Limited for the acquisition of a 100% equity stake in Bidvest Bank Limited. This agreementreflectsthe Bank’s commitment to strengtheningits footprint in South Africa and consolidating onits position as the continent's gateway to global
html: Access Holdings Plc has announced that its banking subsidiary, Access Bank has entered into a binding agreement with South Africa-based Bidvest Group Limited for the acquisition of a 100% equity stake in Bidvest Bank Limited.
